extension.description: Orion v3.3.2 - 25+ torrent scrapers: Russian trackers (Rutor, RuTracker, Kinozal, NNM-Club), TorrServer, Torrentio, PirateBay, YTS, EZTV, 1337x, Knaben, TorrentGalaxy, SolidTorrents, BTDig, LimeTorrents, Nyaa, Comet, Torlock, GloDLS, MagnetDL, KickAss, MediaFusion, Jackettio. Real-Debrid, Premiumize, AllDebrid, Trakt, ResolveURL.
extension.news: [3.3.2] Fixed dependency issue - removed unnecessary script.module.requests requirement. Lowered xbmc.python version for wider compatibility.
